title: llm.stt_catalog
description: Enumerate the addressable speech-to-text surface — the registered STT provider names, what each would run, and the routing config. Takes no arguments. Returns {status: 'ok', providers: [{name, available, model, pinned_model, supports_diarization, supported_languages, cost_per_hour}], default_provider, fallback_chain, language_routes}. Each provider's `model` is its effective model — the per-registration `speech_model` pin when set, else the configured default (`pinned_model` flags which). Read-only: writes no PromptLog row.
